title: Find a route
subtitle: Loop routes from where you are
pickStartHint: Tap the map to set the start
empty: No loops found. Try a different distance.
rateLimit: Daily route limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
needLocation: Waiting for your location to suggest routes.
safety: Routes are suggested from open map data and haven't been checked on the ground. Stay alert: paths can cross roads or be closed or private.
attribution: Routes powered by openrouteservice. Map data from OpenStreetMap contributors.
